variants.name: 圣诞老人
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家:你决定他是淘气还是乖巧，淘气可能会让他或你遭遇一些不好的事情，乖巧可能会让他或你遭遇一些好的事情。
variants.firstNightReminder: Choose a player, Yes to signal Nice, No to signal Naughty
variants.otherNightReminder: Choose a player, Yes to signal Nice, No to signal Naughty
variants.flavor: My dear, as night descends on our snowy realm, I set out to uncover secrets and protect our Christmas joy from lurking shadows.
